content: Outpatient treatment for high-risk patients within 5 days of symptom onset: nirmatrelvir/ritonavir (Paxlovid) preferred (89% reduction in hospitalization/death in EPIC-HR); remdesivir IV x3 days alternative; molnupiravir if others unavailable/contraindicated. Drug-drug interactions with Paxlovid require review (CYP3A substrate medications). Outpatient supportive care: antipyretics, hydration, monitoring for deterioration. Hospitalized patients not requiring oxygen: dexamethasone 6mg daily + remdesivir. Requiring oxygen: dexamethasone + remdesivir; consider tocilizumab or baricitinib for rapidly progressive disease. ICU patients: dexamethasone + tocilizumab/baricitinib; anticoagulation prophylaxis unless contraindicated. Monoclonal antibodies largely ineffective against current Omicron variants.
